patches.name: Change Instagram share domain
patches.description: Rewrites generated Instagram share links to ig.nelu.lol.

patches.name: Change Reddit share domain
patches.description: Rewrites generated Reddit share links to redlib.kareem.one.

patches.name: Change Threads share domain
patches.description: Rewrites generated Threads share links to shoelace.kareem.one.

patches.name: Change TikTok share domain
patches.description: Rewrites generated TikTok share links to sticktock.kareem.one.

patches.name: Change Twitter share domain
patches.description: Rewrites generated Twitter/X share links to nitter.kareem.one.

patches.name: Disable Twitter PairIP startup checks
patches.description: Bypasses X/Twitter PairIP integrity startup checks that crash after APKM repacking.

patches.name: Sanitize Reddit share links
patches.description: Stops Reddit from appending tracking query parameters to shared links.

patches.name: Sanitize Twitter share links
patches.description: Stops Twitter/X from appending tracking query parameters to shared links.
